extraction.one_line_summary: EVENEPOEL Remco won 35km flat TT by 1 second over Thomas, regaining maglia rosa with negative split after trailing at early time checks
tactical_patterns: EVENEPOEL trailed KÄMNA by 11 seconds early but negative-split strategy netted critical seconds over THOMAS in final kilometer
ROGLIC started slower than KÄMNA early but improved splits throughout, signaling long TT pacing superiority over explosive starters
HART posting career-best TT despite normally modest chronoman credentials suggests INEOS dialed in position-specific preparation

rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: positive: negative split execution under pressure indicates championship-level TT maturity, not just raw power
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: neutral: 1-second defeat after leading in hotseat reveals elite form but suggests peak TT power slightly below world champion level
rider_signals.ROGLIC Primoz: positive: slow start but strong finish at 19s shows diesel engine pacing that could favor later mountain TTs
rider_signals.HART Tao Geoghegan: positive: third place career-best TT signals unexpected stage-race depth, not just climbing specialist
rider_signals.KUNG Stefan: negative: 4-second defeat after teammate set fast time suggests missed stage win opportunity on ideal flat terrain
rider_signals.LEKNESSUND Andreas: neutral: relinquished rosa as expected but stayed within 3 minutes, confirming early race strength wasn't fluke
